decisions.rationale: requestAccountDeletion erases journal_entries and profiles then signs out; auth.users persists and handle_new_user can recreate a profile on re-login. Valid prototype-scope gap, but criteria_audit AC-3 and functional_audit FV-3 pass on row deletion + sign-out + redirect; decompose AC-3 forbids project/ schema edits and the implemented supabase path already added profiles DELETE RLS. Full auth.admin.deleteUser needs a service_role edge function in supabase — out of SET-04 scope and not required by any downstream depends_on gate. Document and land auth-user teardown in a later backend-parity or settings-hardening wave.

IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHYXS carries style_ref Button_outline_ and ai_RNbBHYXV carries Button_destructive_, and Bubble label_icon buttons specify phosphor download-simple/trash icons. Review ui_evidence is partial (not fail) on both named decompose ui_refs; criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3 and functional_audit FV-1..FV-3 pass. AC-2 gates export initiation and delete-popup open behavior, not icon or bubbleStyle presentation — DeleteConfirmPopup confirm (ai_RNbBHYXf) already applies bubbleStyle(Button_destructive_). Tab action buttons need Lucide icons plus bubbleStyle classes (~5-line SettingsPrivacyTab.tsx change) batchable with SET-02/SET-03 settings visual-parity deferrals under DS-01 token bridge; no module item lists SET-04 in depends_on.

Reviewer confirms decompose AC-3 workflow ids bTIiN/bTIiS resolve to coaching-mode ChangeThing steps in Bubble workflow 024988c5, not account deletion; delete-confirm-btn only HideElement on the popup. Implemented Supabase row deletion + sign-out is the correct pragmatic parity for prototype scope and satisfies AC-3 functional intent. This is a decompose AC wording error — update MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS SET-04 acceptance_criteria on a future decompose pass; no implement rewrite required.

Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-fix failures (missing DELETE RLS, journal export, sign-out redirect, generic UI markers) although criteria, functional_verification, and review criteria_audit now pass on all three ACs and FV-1..FV-3. Coverage-artifact hygiene only — mirrors SET-02 C-3 and SET-03 C-3 deferrals. Refresh cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SET-04-privacy-tab-and-delete-flow.json preflight.gaps on the next coverage pass so re-review diffs stay readable.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 auth.users persistence after row deletion (backend-parity / edge-function wave); C-2 export/delete button phosphor icons and Button_outline_/Button_destructive_ bubbleStyle on ai_RNbBHYXS/ai_RNbBHYXV (DS-01 settings visual-parity batch with SET-02/SET-03); C-4 stale coverage preflight.gaps (refresh on next coverage run). Accepted: C-3 decompose AC-3 bTIiN/bTIiS workflow citation mismatch — implementation parity is correct. ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
